title: Lucid Group Q4 Earnings Preview: Will LCID Stock Continue to Rise?
text: Analysts projected Lucid Group would report Q4 revenues of $181.76 million, representing a nearly 30% year-over-year decline. Deliveries fell approximately 12% compared to the prior year quarter. Key metrics to monitor during earnings call included 2024 guidance following recent price reductions, Saudi Arabia operations and vehicle assembly updates, gross margin trajectory and capital requirements, pricing strategy discussion, and technology partnerships including licensing arrangements. Wall Street maintained a hold consensus rating from 12 analysts. The mean price target of $5.47 implied 47% upside from closing prices, though the stock traded below street-low estimates. Morgan Stanley analyst Adam Jonas suggested the worst-case scenario may already be reflected in valuations. Macro headwinds including elevated interest rates and economic softness could continue pressuring sentiment in coming quarters.
